task_completion.description: Agent opened the specification file to read the required parameter values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the contents of /home/ga/Documents/QGC/lidar_payload_spec.txt with the target parameter values.

task_completion.description: Agent opened QGroundControl and navigated to the Parameters setup page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl is open, and the 'Parameters' tab is selected in the Vehicle Setup menu.

task_completion.description: Agent set the WPNAV speed parameters to the specified values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the QGC parameter editor, WPNAV_SPEED is set to 800, WPNAV_SPEED_UP to 150, and WPNAV_SPEED_DN to 100.

task_completion.description: Agent set the WPNAV acceleration and radius parameters to the specified values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the QGC parameter editor, WPNAV_ACCEL is set to 200 and WPNAV_RADIUS to 300.

task_completion.description: Agent set the LOIT and RTL speed parameters to the specified values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the QGC parameter editor, LOIT_SPEED is set to 800 and RTL_SPEED to 500.

task_completion.description: Agent successfully applied the parameters live to the vehicle.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The updated parameter values are visible in the QGC parameter list, and there are no 'unsaved changes' warnings or pending write dialogs.

integrity.description: Agent used the QGroundControl GUI to modify parameters.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the QGroundControl interface, rather than using terminal commands or scripts to set parameters.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual QGroundControl application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The parameter changes are made within the genuine QGroundControl application window, not just typed into a text file or mock-up.

integrity.description: Agent did not reboot the vehicle.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no 'Vehicle Rebooting' messages, disconnected states, or reboot commands visible in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires setting 7 parameters in QGroundControl based on /home/ga/Documents/QGC/lidar_payload_spec.txt. Target values: WPNAV_SPEED: 800.0, WPNAV_SPEED_UP: 150.0, WPNAV_SPEED_DN: 100.0, WPNAV_ACCEL: 200.0, WPNAV_RADIUS: 300.0, LOIT_SPEED: 800.0, RTL_SPEED: 500.0. The parameters must be set live without rebooting the vehicle.
